Talks & Presentations

Sharing ideas at conferences, meetups, and workshops. Slides and recordings where available.

The Future of Design Systems

Config 2024 · San Francisco

How design tokens and component libraries are reshaping the way teams build at scale.

Frontend Meetup · Your City

January 2024 Lightning Talk

Why I Deleted My Figma Plugins

Local Design Conf · Your City

Five minutes on constraint, simplicity, and why fewer tools often means better work.
